column34: The Volunteer agrees to be available to serve the Church through initiatives from Vox Ecclesiae and the Archdiocese of Madras - Mylapore. The Volunteer shall adhere to the guidelines prescribed by the leaders and actively participate in all training programs for skill enhancement and personal development.
column35: The Volunteer commits to serving the mission through various ministries, including but not limited to visiting parishes, organizing events, assisting with media coverage for official events, and acting as a resource person for event organization in alignment with their skill set. The Volunteer shall ensure that there is no conflict of interest when engaging in activities with other organizations or bodies.
column36: The Volunteer shall live an exemplary life as a Catholic Christian, ensuring that all comments and expressions align with the teachings of the Catholic Church. The Volunteer shall refrain from making loose or inappropriate statements and shall accept feedback from the leaders of Vox Ecclesiae and the Archdiocese of Madras - Mylapore, making corrections through recommended and ethical actions as necessary. Furthermore, the Volunteer acknowledges and accepts the spiritual leadership of the Archbishop of Madras - Mylapore and pledges complete obedience to his guidance and directives.
column37: The Volunteer acknowledges that the Organization values and protects personal data with the utmost confidentiality. The information provided will be used solely for internal analysis to develop initiatives that align with the mission of the Digital Ministry. Any sharing of data with other forums will only occur when absolutely necessary and in a manner that ensures transparency and aligns with the Volunteer’s awareness.
